name: GMK CYL Selene
description: Designed by whysoda and inspired by the Greek Titaness of the Moon, GMK CYL Selene uses GMK's special-effects ABS plastic to produce a rainbow glitter reflect in purple and teal across a silver-grey base. Double-shot Cherry profile, manufactured in Germany, with kits covering ISO layouts, novelties depicting moon phases, and a dedicated spacebar kit. Global buy running May–June 2026 with Q4 2026 fulfillment.
